name: Brex
api_notes: The API covers core objects including accounting data, budgets, expenses, fields, payments (ACH/wire/check), teams (users/cards), transactions, and webhooks.
auth_notes: The documentation specifies using OAuth for authentication and authorization. Admins can generate user tokens within the Brex dashboard.
one_liner: Brex is a unified corporate spend and expense management platform that provides a REST API for programmatically managing financial data, payments, and company teams.
access_notes: The Brex API is available to all Brex customers free of charge; account and card admins can generate API tokens directly via their Brex dashboard.
mcp_notes: No official or community MCP server was found in the provided documentation.

evidence.claim: Brex is a unified spend platform providing corporate cards, expense management, reimbursements, travel, and bill pay.
The Brex API is available to all customers free of charge.
Brex APIs use OAuth for authentication and authorization.
